metadata.title: Claude, Wondering.
metadata.description: Skill teardown: medhavy — the MEDHAVY Wonder register cut. First principles, genuine wonder, no drills, no exercise beat. Self-demo: Phase 2 register rewrite.

beats.narration_text: Nǐ hǎo, Liam. Liam, in for Bear. Today: medhavy — the MEDHAVY Wonder cut. You give it a reel or a lecture, it forks the beat sheet, rewrites every narration in the Wonder register — first principles, genuine wonder, intellectual honesty, no drills — and closes with the Medhavy.com outro. Same facts. Different relationship with them.

props.runningText: * scaffold → wonder rewrite → optional experiment → outro...
output: Wonder register: first principles / genuine wonder / no drills

beats.narration_text: The medhavy skill has one register: Wonder. The audience is a research student — someone who came to understand, not to act. The anatomy: the medhavy brand data file holds register rules, voice config, Okabe-Ito palette, outro spec. brand_variant.py scaffolds the medhavy- directory and marks every narration as a todo. The Wonder voice guide specifies the three constraints: first principles, genuine wonder, and intellectual honesty. Voice is Kokoro af_kore — different from the claude-liam channel voice, which is part of the brand.

props.title: Wonder register. Research student. First principles.
props.calloutSub: Okabe-Ito palette: eggshell / ink / teal / vermillion

beats.narration_text: Five phases. One: scaffold — brand_variant.py creates the medhavy- directory, marks all narrations as todos. Two: rewrite in Wonder register — first principles, build the idea up from what the viewer already knows, name what is uncertain. Three: optional experiment tangent — one bounded aside per video, only if the material obviously invites it, never forced. Four: Medhavy.com outro — no exercise beat, no CLI command, the discovery ends on the outro. Five: build — GATE P first, then Kokoro af_kore audio.

props.title: 5 phases: scaffold → wonder rewrite → experiment → outro → build

phases.label: Rewrite
phases.note: Wonder: first principles / genuine wonder / honesty

beats.narration_text: Before the mechanism, let me show you Phase 2 — the Wonder register rewrite. I am going to take one canonical narration and rewrite it for a research student. The canonical version states. The Wonder version asks — it builds the idea from first principles and invites the viewer to feel the surprise.

props.command: Rewrite one beat in Wonder register
output: Wonder: first principles + surprise + intellectual honesty

beats.narration_text: Here is the canonical narration: 'The medhavy skill forks a finished reel into a medhavy- directory, rewrites every beat in the Wonder register, and closes with the Medhavy.com outro. The canonical beat sheet is never modified.' Now the Wonder rewrite: Here is what happens when you read the same sentence twice — once as an explanation, once as a discovery. The medhavy skill does not change the facts. It changes the relationship the viewer has with them. What was a statement becomes a question. What was an answer becomes a phenomenon. The scaffold creates the fork. The rewrite is what matters. The researcher who reads the canonical version learns what is true. The researcher who reads the Wonder version is invited to wonder why.

props.title: Phase 2 — Wonder register rewrite

medhavy does not change the facts. It changes the

beats.narration_text: The first mechanism: no drills. The MEDHAVY register has one structural prohibition — no exercises in the body, no CLI commands, no problem sets. This is not an omission. It is the design. The medhavy audience came to understand, not to act. The Wonder cut exists to build the intuition before anyone asks the viewer to apply it. A drill in a discovery cut is a category error. It signals that the author does not trust the wonder to be enough.

props.heading: No drills. Discovery before application.
props.body: The medhavy audience came to understand, not to act. No exercises in the body, no CLI commands, no problem sets. A drill in a discovery cut is a category error — it signals the author does not trust the wonder to be enough. The Wonder register builds intuition; hai and nbb handle application.
props.quote: No drills, no exercises in the body. This is the discovery cut, not a problem set.

beats.narration_text: The second mechanism: the experiment tangent. Most reels get none. If the material obviously invites a small experiment, add one bounded aside. The SKILL.md gives the exact invitation formula: 'Want to see this yourself? Try this.' A paste-ready LLM prompt on a prompt card, with a re-entry cue. One per video. Never forced. The test: if you are reaching to create the experiment opportunity, the material is not inviting it. Skip it.

props.heading: Experiment tangent. One per video. Material must invite it.
props.body: Most reels get no experiment tangent. One bounded aside only when the material obviously invites it — a paste-ready LLM prompt with a re-entry cue. One per video, never forced. If you are reaching to create the opportunity, the material is not inviting it. Skip it.
props.quote: Want to see this yourself? Try this.
props.cite: Source: skills/make/medhavy/SKILL.md — Step 3 experiment tangent formula

beats.narration_text: The third mechanism: no exercise beat. This is the standing rule that separates medhavy from hai and nbb. The hai cut inserts a CLI worked exercise as the second-to-last beat. The nbb cut inserts an LLM exercise. The medhavy cut ends on the outro. The SKILL.md states it plainly: MEDHAVY is the Wonder discovery cut; it ends on the outro. The intuition that Wonder builds feeds the exercise that hai and nbb demand — they are complementary, not competing.

props.heading: Ends on outro. No exercise beat ever.
props.body: hai inserts a CLI exercise second-to-last. nbb inserts an LLM exercise. medhavy ends on the outro. MEDHAVY builds the intuition; hai and nbb demand the application. They are complementary, not competing. Never add an exercise beat to a medhavy cut.
props.quote: NO exercise beat — MEDHAVY is the Wonder discovery cut; it ends on the outro.

beats.narration_text: Claude, Wondering. The medhavy skill delivers four things: a medhavy- directory with the canonical untouched, every narration rewritten in the Wonder register — first principles, genuine wonder, intellectual honesty, no drills — an optional experiment tangent if the material invites it, and the Medhavy.com outro. No exercise beat, ever. Voice: Kokoro af_kore.

artifactLines: medhavy- directory — canonical beat_sheet.json never touched
Wonder register: first principles / genuine wonder / intellectual honesty / no drills
Optional experiment tangent (0–1 per video, never forced)
Medhavy.com outro — no exercise beat, ends on the outro

beats.narration_text: Two questions before you run medhavy. First: have you read the Wonder voice guide — voices/wonder/VOICE.md — so your rewrites build from first principles and name what is genuinely uncertain? Second: is the canonical beat_sheet.json untouched? The scaffold creates the medhavy- directory; never edit the source.

output: 1. VOICE.md: first principles + name the uncertain
